name: MMS
blurb: Massively Multilingual Speech — transcription for over 1,100 languages, most of them served by no other model.
about: Meta’s Massively Multilingual Speech project scaled wav2vec 2.0 to more than 1,100 languages — roughly 10× the coverage of Whisper. For hundreds of low-resource languages, MMS is effectively the only ASR available.
Note the licence: CC-BY-NC 4.0 — research and non-commercial use only. For the languages it uniquely covers, that is usually an acceptable trade.
install:
pip install transformers torchaudio

python -c "
from transformers import pipeline
asr = pipeline('automatic-speech-recognition',
  'facebook/mms-1b-all')
print(asr('audio.wav'))"
